BEGIN:VCALENDAR
PRODID:-//Custom//CUHK Graduation Calendar//EN
VERSION:2.0
CALNAME:CUHK Graduation Day
CALSCALE:GREGORIAN
METHOD:PUBLISH
BEGIN:VTIMEZONE
TZID:Asia/Hong_Kong
X-LIC-LOCATION:Asia/Hong_Kong
BEGIN:STANDARD
TZOFFSETFROM:+0800
TZOFFSETTO:+0800
TZNAME:HKT
DTSTART:19700101T000000
END:STANDARD
END:VTIMEZONE
BEGIN:VEVENT
UID:a5b1c8c5-1bd4-44e3-b1c4-b811ad88e4d0@custom
DTSTAMP:20251018T171558Z
SUMMARY:CUHK Graduation Ceremony (My Big Day!)
LOCATION:Shaw Hall\, The Chinese University of Hong Kong
DESCRIPTION:Remember to go and collect your graduation gown in advance. My parents and boyfriend will come to watch the ceremony.
DTSTART;TZID=Asia/Hong_Kong:20240615T140000
DTEND;TZID=Asia/Hong_Kong:20240615T163000
END:VEVENT
BEGIN:VEVENT
UID:f49b7989-aa1c-47ab-b277-19291ff4991a@custom
DTSTAMP:20251018T171558Z
SUMMARY:Graduation Celebration Dinner
LOCATION:Din Tai Fung (New Town Plaza Store)\, Sha Tin
DESCRIPTION:A window seat was reserved in advance.
DTSTART;TZID=Asia/Hong_Kong:20240615T190000
DTEND;TZID=Asia/Hong_Kong:20240615T210000
END:VEVENT
END:VCALENDAR
